title: Biometric Identification Compliance for High-Risk AI Systems
trigger: high-risk AI system, biometric identification of natural persons
requirement: Implement and maintain robust safeguards to prevent unauthorized access or misuse.

title: Employment and Workforce Management AI Oversight
trigger: AI system for recruitment, selection of natural persons
requirement: Ensure transparency in decision-making processes and prevent biases.

title: Access to Essential Services and Benefits AI Evaluation Compliance
trigger: AI system for evaluating eligibility of natural persons for benefits, services
requirement: Conduct fair and unbiased assessments to determine benefit access.

title: Law Enforcement AI Use Compliance for Risk Assessment and Profiling
trigger: AI system used by law enforcement authorities for individual risk assessments, profiling of natural persons
requirement: Ensure AI tools are non-discriminatory and respect fundamental rights.

title: Prohibition of Subliminal AI Techniques
trigger: high-risk AI system, processing personal data
requirement: Do not deploy or use an AI system that deploys subliminal techniques beyond a person’s consciousness to materially distort behaviour in ways likely causing harm.

title: Prohibition of AI Exploiting Vulnerabilities
trigger: high-risk AI system, processing personal data
requirement: Do not place on the market or use an AI system that exploits vulnerabilities of a specific group due to age, disability, or social/economic situation.

title: Prohibition of AI for Social Scoring by Public Authorities
trigger: high-risk AI system, processing personal data
requirement: Do not use AI systems for social scoring that lead to detrimental treatment of individuals or groups.
evidence_required: fundamental rights impact assessment, bias audit

title: Restrictions on Real-Time Remote Biometric Identification Systems in Public Spaces
trigger: real-time remote biometric identification systems, publicly accessible spaces
requirement: Use real-time remote biometric identification systems only under strictly defined circumstances permitted by law.
evidence_required: risk register, monitoring procedure, logging and audit trail

title: Restrictions on AI Emotion Recognition in Workplaces and Educational Institutions
trigger: emotion recognition systems, workplace or educational institution environments
requirement: Use AI emotion recognition only where strictly necessary for medical reasons.
evidence_required: risk register, bias audit, transparency notice

title: Transparency Obligation for AI Systems Interacting with Natural Persons
trigger: high-risk AI system, processing personal data
requirement: Providers shall ensure that AI systems intended to interact directly with natural persons are designed and developed in such a way that the natural persons concerned are informed they are interacting with an AI system.

title: AI Content Marking Obligation for Synthetic Outputs
trigger: general-purpose AI systems generating synthetic audio, image, video or text content
requirement: Providers of such AI systems shall ensure that the outputs are marked in a machine-readable format and detectable as artificially generated or manipulated.

title: Emotion Recognition and Biometric Categorisation Disclosure Obligation
trigger: emotion recognition system, biometric categorisation system
requirement: Deployers of such systems shall inform the natural persons exposed thereto and process personal data in accordance with Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725, as applicable.

title: Deep Fake Disclosure Obligation for Generated or Manipulated Content
trigger: AI system generating or manipulating image, audio or video content constituting a deep fake
requirement: Deployers shall disclose that the content has been artificially generated or manipulated.

title: AI-Generated Text Disclosure Obligation for Public Interest Information
trigger: text generated with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest
requirement: Deployers shall disclose that the text has been artificially generated or manipulated.

title: Transparency Disclosure Timing Obligation
trigger: first interaction or exposure to AI system
requirement: Information shall be provided in a clear and distinguishable manner at the latest time of first interaction.
